arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Mikel Arteta receives 'positive reports' over £327k Aaron Ramsdale replacement
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly shortlist 22-year-old Boca Juniors goalkeeper Leandro Brey as a transfer target for the January 2025 window.

arts.ttl: Arteta backs Martinelli to thrive in ‘bigger role’ at Arsenal after Saka injury
arts.sum: Manager plays down claims Arsenal could buy in January Saka out for ‘many weeks’ after injury at Crystal Palace Mikel Arteta is hoping Gabriel Martinelli can help to fill the void created by Bukayo Saka’s hamstring injury, with the England forward likely to miss key fixtures including the north London derby next month. Arteta confirmed on Monday that Saka was expected to be absent for “many weeks” after tearing a hamstring during the first half of Arsenal’s win at Crystal Palace. That would rule him out of Premier League fixtures including Arsenal’s game with Tottenham on 15 January, the Carabao Cup semi‑final first leg against Newcastle and an FA Cup third‑round tie with Manchester United. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta ready to put trust in Arsenal's Bukayo Saka replacement - 'He loves it!'
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka faces a spell on the sidelines with the hamstring injury he picked up in Arsenal's 5-1 win at Crystal Palace before Christmas, with the Gunners hosting Ipswich on Friday

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta can unleash Gabriel Martinelli with forthcoming Arsenal January transfer - Josh Holland
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka being out for the foreseeable future means Arsenal face lacking the needed firepower to overcome Liverpool in the Premier League title race. Gabriel Jesus' recent form means there is less pressure on signing a centre-forward next month.

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies says 'incredible' player Arsenal want to sign is actually better than Bukayo Saka
Everything spotted in Arsenal training before Ipswich amid new injury worry
arts.sum: Injury issues have eased for Arteta as of late but this latest blow and another possible scare could see the list of absentees increase again. Arsenal will thus have to navigate the next the next few fixtures without Saka with a number of possible replacements available.

arts.ttl: Team News: Arsenal vs. Ipswich Town injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Friday's Premier League clash between Arsenal and Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Ipswich postponement latest as thick fog causes Premier League chaos
arts.sum: Currently though, there is no major concern that Arsenal's Premier League clash against Ipswich will be postponed. However, just a few weeks later, another Liverpool fixture appears in doubt with their 8pm clash against Leicester at Anfield facing the possibility of being called off due to fog.

At a festively-filled Emirates Stadium, we’ll be looking to extend our 16-game unbeaten home run against a side who haven’t beaten us in N5 since 1979, but Kieran McKenna’s current crop have won two of their last three on their travels as they get to grips with life in the top-flight after successive promotions. We have scored 5+ goals in seven different Premier League games in 2024 – the last team to do so in more top-flight games in a single calendar year were Burnley (9 in 1960), while the last time we did so was in 1931 (8).

arts.ttl: Arsenal identify dream Benjamin Sesko transfer alternative ahead of January window
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly keeping an eye on Wolverhampton Wanderers striker Matheus Cunha as an alternative to RB Leipzig's Benjamin Sesko. Like Sesko, Williams is unlikely to be available in January and the Gunners will need to be patient to sign him.
